sources.quote: Gemini 2.5 Pro `gemini-2.5-pro` ... Input price Free of charge $1.25, prompts <= 200k tokens $2.50, prompts > 200k tokens Output price (including thinking tokens) Free of charge $10.00, prompts <= 200k tokens $15.00, prompts > 200k Context caching price Not available $0.125, prompts <= 200k tokens
Input token limit 1,048,576 Output token limit 65,536

notes: Gemini pricing may vary by modality and prompt length; this entry records the cited standard text or text/image/video tier.
